ab: Miyah da emptgsa!
en: The teacher is here.

ab: Iya hmrapas da! Nahari tluung babaw tleengan.
ch: B:不要再玩了!快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.

ab: Akay! Msuqi ku da!
en: Sorry, I’m late!

ab: Nahari miyah ruwan.
en: Come in quickly.

ab: Piya jiyax iyax sngayan ka sayang hug?
en: What day is it today?

ab: Rima jiyax iyax sngayan ka sayang, msangay ka kusun, seupu ta musa rmigaw nganguc haw!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: Malu hmi! Emta siyaw yayung.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.

ab: Piya jiyax iyax sngayan ka kusun hug?
en: What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: Tru jiyax iyax sngayan ka kusun, musa ta hmrapas boru babaw ska hidaw ka kusun haw!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: Phuya su ka saman kusun hug?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: Jiyax sngayan ka kusun, tuhuy ku bubu musa pnrhulan.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.

ab: Ga su hmuya dhug?
en: What’s wrong?

ab: Kmtbrih ku balay, musa ku psnganguc.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: Mkuni balay tunux mu.
en: I feel dizzy.

ab: Msangay babaw tleengan ka isu han.
ch: B:你先躺臥在椅子上休息。
en: Lie down and rest.

ab: Emptgsa, mnarux buyas mu, musa ku psnganguc.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: Iq wah! Nahari usa.
en: Okay, go quickly.

ab: Tduwa ku musa trima baga hug?
en: May I go wash my hands?

ab: Uxay biyaw malax meuyas patas da, Usa kiya hari dwah!
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: Emptgsa, mnarux tunux mu, msangay ku ka babaw ska hidaw.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: Iq wah! Qlahang hari musa sapah.
en: Okay, take care and go home.

ab: Emptgsa msangay ku ka babaw kingal jiyax iyax sngayan, musa ku qmita empsapuh.
ch: A:老師我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.

ab: Iq wah! Qlhangi nanaq ka hiyi su.
en: Alright, take care of yourself.

ab: Gaga inu ka Ubing hug?
en: Where is Ubing?

ab: Mnarux buyas na, ga mniq psnganguc ka hiya.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.

ab: Gaga inu ka Huwac hug?
en: Where is Huwac?

ab: Emptgsa, mnarux glu ka Huwac, kika msangay ka jiyax sayang.
ch: B:老師，Huwac喉嚨痛，所以今天請假。
en: Teacher, Huwac has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.

ab: Ma ini iyah ka Pitay hug?
en: Why didn’t Pitay come?

ab: Ga mnarux da!
en: She has a fever.
